title: Redstone Lever
body:
[![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5df054f9ecf209c3f6a62629613313f743feeccf.png)](https://discord.gg/QApmFh8BHW)

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ebe1d0017151c970735893e28e93f034a8f7c8.png)

Resourcepack adds a glow effect to levers. Now the activated levers look like a redstone torch ( in the style of **1.21.2** ), which makes them visible even in the dark. Now it is possible to accurately and clearly distinguish the state of the lever: is it turned on or not

![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zQaKPdnf/images/a0186572dd965b9f9bc624c4effd13a6a574b8a6.png)
